prod.name: Boundary - Arabic name with full diacritics @boundary @arabic @diacritics
prod.notes: Employee name with full Arabic diacritics (تشكيل). Tests that diacritics are preserved exactly in free_text fields — R_ARABIC_JSON fix validation.

prod.name: Boundary - Arabic with mixed numerals Eastern and Western @boundary @arabic @numerals
prod.notes: Arabic Eastern numerals (٢٠ ٢٦) mixed with Western numerals in dates. Tests numeral normalization and date parsing in bilingual context.
prod.initialRequest: أريد إجازة سنوية. هيرماني، تكنولوجيا المعلومات، ياسر عرفات

prod.name: Boundary - Arabic Tatweel (character extension) in name @boundary @arabic @tatweel
prod.notes: Arabic name contains Tatweel (ـ) character used for text stretching. Tests that extended Arabic characters are handled without breaking JSON formation.

prod.name: Boundary - Arabic month names in date @boundary @arabic @date
prod.notes: User provides date using Arabic month names. AI should convert to DD-MMM-YYYY format. Tests multilingual date parsing.
